message:
fix: eliminate 9 remaining stubs — real scanning, metrics, health checks (v3.5.72)

- Swarm status: real metrics from state files (elapsed time, avg response, coordination counts)
- Security threats: real STRIDE-mapped file scanning (eval, exec, credentials, http, auth patterns)
- Security secrets: real regex-based scanning with masking (AWS, GitHub, JWT, private keys, etc.)
- Hooks attention: ONNX embedding cascade replaces Math.sin hash, removes fabricated speedup claims
- Neural tools: 4-tier embedding cascade (agentic-flow → ONNX → mock-fallback), provider visible in responses
- Performance benchmarks: honest _dataSource:'synthetic' labels, actual timing still measured
- System health: real disk check (statfsSync) and network check (DNS lookup with timeout)
- Plugin ratings: transparent 'cached — cloud unavailable' label on fallback
- Swarm execute: clarified 3 execution paths (Agent tool, claude -p, hive-mind)

All tests pass: 28/28 files, 1725/1725 tests, 0 TypeScript errors.

Co-authored-by: Reuven <cohen@ruv-mac-mini.local>
